Class DRFont

java.lang.Object
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.base.style.DRFont
All Implemented Interfaces:
DRIFont, Serializable
public class DRFont extends Object implements DRIFont

DRFont class.

Author:
Ricardo Mariaca
